meta.attribution: Product data attributed to Product Hunt.
meta.commercialUsage: Product Hunt API must not be used for commercial purposes without Product Hunt approval.

issues.title: 产品灵感日报 · 20 个新品

products.name: Fuzzy AI
products.tagline: We warm your prospects before reaching out
products.summaryZh: 我们在接触潜在客户之前，先为他们预热。
products.descriptionZh: 冷启动的主动联系常被忽略，因为潜在客户还不认识你。Fuzzy 能在你联系前先预热——找到已活跃在你市场中的用户，通过内容和有见地的评论帮你保持可见度，再以你的风格发起个性化的领英和邮件营销。调研、信息丰富、序列、回复及团队工作流都集中在一处。客户称其直观、无缝，比他们之前使用的工具更全面。
products.description: Cold outreach gets ignored because prospects do not know you yet. Fuzzy warms them before you ever reach out by finding people already engaging in your market, helping you stay visible through content and thoughtful comments, then launching personalised LinkedIn and email campaigns in your voice. Research, enrichment, sequences, replies and team workflows live in one place. Customers call it intuitive, seamless and more comprehensive than the tools they used before.

products.name: Nautis
products.tagline: The AI-native Operating System for founders.
products.summaryZh: 面向创始人的AI原生操作系统。
products.descriptionZh: Nautis 是为创始人打造的AI原生操作系统。通过一个互联的工作空间，管理融资、规划、财务、文档、会议、客户关系管理、招聘及日常运营。与相互割裂的SaaS工具不同，每个模块共享同一AI核心，为您提供具备上下文感知的自动化、更智能的洞察，以及一位理解您业务（而非单一应用）的AI幕僚。减少管理工具的时间，专注创造价值。
products.description: Nautis is the AI-native Operating System for founders. Manage fundraising, planning, finance, documents, meetings, CRM, hiring, and daily operations from one connected workspace. Unlike disconnected SaaS tools, every module shares one AI brain, giving you context-aware automation, smarter insights, and a Chief of Staff that understands your business—not just one app. Spend less time managing tools and more time building.

products.name: Loova Ads Studio
products.tagline: Create AI ads that convert, not just look good
products.summaryZh: 制作能转化、而非仅好看的AI广告
products.descriptionZh: Loova Ads Studio 是一款一站式AI广告工作室，可制作UGC视频、产品广告、虚拟形象视频及静态创意素材。其设计以转化为核心，而非仅注重视觉效果，帮助品牌与代理商以低于2美元的成本制作高转化率广告。
products.description: Loova Ads Studio is an all-in-one AI ad studio that creates UGC videos, product commercials, avatar videos, and static creatives. Built for conversions, not just visuals, it helps brands and agencies make high-performing ads for under $2 each.

products.name: Replay QA
products.tagline: Replay QA tells you what is broken before your users do
products.summaryZh: Replay QA 能在用户发现问题之前，就告诉你哪里出了故障。
products.descriptionZh: 添加你的 GitHub 仓库以进行持续测试，或输入 URL 进行一次性检查。Replay QA 会探索你的应用、记录每次会话、发现真实 bug，并向你的编码代理提供根本原因和修复方案。免费试用：qa.replay.io
products.description: Add your GitHub repo for continuous testing, or drop in a URL for a one-time check. Replay QA explores your app, records every session, finds real bugs, and gives your coding agent the root cause and fix. Try for free: qa.replay.io

products.name: Skippr AI
products.tagline: The live AI employee inside your product, serving every user
products.summaryZh: 产品中的实时AI员工，服务于每一位用户
products.descriptionZh: 实时智能体，可观察、对话并操作软件。它们能自主完成用户引导、激活与解障。Skippr智能体跨完整会话保持议程与记忆，支持10种语言，通过内置浏览器自动化在屏幕上执行操作。完全自助：数分钟内即可创建智能体，嵌入两行代码或分享会议链接即可使用。基于您的知识库训练，适配品牌风格。200免费积分起步，无需绑定银行卡。如需更深入的企业版，请与我联系。
products.description: Real-time agents that see, talk, and operate software. They onboard, activate, and unblock your users. On their own. Skippr agents keep agenda and memory across full sessions, speak 10 languages, and act on screen with built-in browser automation. Fully self-serve: spin up an agent in minutes, embed with 2 lines of code, or share a meeting link. Trained on your knowledge, styled to your brand. 200 free credits to start, no card required. Talk to me for the deeper enterprise version.

products.name: Inkling
products.tagline: Open weights 975B multimodal model built for fine-tuning
products.summaryZh: 开放权重975B多模态模型，专为微调设计
products.descriptionZh: Inkling 是 Thinking Machines 的首个开放权重模型，采用 975B MoE 架构，拥有 41B 活跃参数、1M 上下文窗口，支持文本、图像和音频的原生推理，并具备可控思考深度。可在 Tinker 上进行微调，或下载 Apache 2.0 权重。
products.description: Inkling is Thinking Machines’ first open-weights model, a 975B MoE with 41B active parameters, 1M context, native reasoning across text, images, and audio, and controllable thinking effort. Fine-tune it on Tinker or download the Apache 2.0 weights.

products.name: Creed
products.tagline: Your personal context file for every agent.
products.summaryZh: 你的个人上下文文件，适用于每个智能体。
products.descriptionZh: 为你的智能体提供个性化背景。Creed 让每个连接的 AI 都能共享并实时了解你的身份、工作方式以及关注重点。
products.description: Personal context for your agents. Creed gives every connected AI a shared, up-to-date understanding of who you are, how you work, and what matters.

products.name: LayerProof Mylar
products.tagline: Create launch-ready motion videos for your products
products.summaryZh: 为你的产品制作可发布的动态视频
products.descriptionZh: LayerProof Motion的AI智能体可将产品页面、文档或提示词转化为完整的动态视频——包含脚本、场景及配音。支持重新生成任意场景、优化每个关键帧，并导出适配多平台的版本。数分钟内即可获得可直接发布的产品视频。
products.description: LayerProof Motion's AI agent turns a product page, doc, or prompt into a full motion video - script, scenes, and voiceover included. Regenerate any scene, refine every keyframe, and export for multiple channels. Launch-ready product video in minutes.

products.name: Backdrop
products.tagline: AI Coworkers that run your projects and operations
products.summaryZh: AI 同事，管理你的项目与运营
products.descriptionZh: AI 提升了执行速度。瓶颈已转向决定构建什么，而决策背后的知识却分散在人员、工具和 AI 对话中。Backdrop 为项目和运营提供 AI 同事，它们了解你的公司、与团队协作，并构建共享的公司上下文。在 Slack、GitHub、Linear、Notion、Asana、Google Workspace 等平台中，它们整合客户反馈、制定计划和规范、管理工单、起草文档，并推动工作持续进行。
products.description: AI made execution faster. The bottleneck has shifted to deciding what to build while the knowledge behind those decisions is scattered across people, tools, and AI chats. Backdrop provides AI coworkers for projects and operations that understand your company, work with your team,and build shared company context. Across Slack, GitHub, Linear, Notion, Asana, Google Workspace and more, they synthesize customer feedback, create plans and specs, manage tickets, draft documents, and keep work moving.

products.name: Scriptyard
products.tagline: A free visual story development workspace
products.summaryZh: 免费的视觉故事开发工作空间
products.descriptionZh: Scriptyard 是一款为编剧和故事创作者打造的空间化故事规划工具。你可以在无限画布上绘制角色、地点、场景与结构，并导出为 Markdown、Fountain 或 Final Draft 格式。
products.description: Scriptyard is a spatial story-planning tool built for screenwriters and storytellers. Map characters, locations, scenes and structure on an infinite canvas, then export to Markdown, Fountain, or Final Draft.

products.name: Kogvio
products.tagline: Understand anything online without leaving the page.
products.summaryZh: 无需离开页面，即可理解网上任何内容。
products.descriptionZh: 每次在网上遇到不懂的内容，我的流程都一样：复制。打开ChatGPT。粘贴。再回来。这完全打断了我的专注。于是我做了Kogvio。在网页或PDF上高亮任何内容，即时在上下文中提问，无需离开页面即可继续学习。无论是文档、研究论文、医学教材还是技术图表，Kogvio帮你理解——而不只是搜索。
products.description: Every time I didn't understand something online, I had the same workflow: Copy. Open ChatGPT. Paste. Come back. It completely broke my focus. So I built Kogvio. Highlight anything on a webpage or PDF, ask questions instantly in context, and continue learning without leaving the page. Whether it's documentation, research papers, medical textbooks, or technical diagrams, Kogvio helps you understand—not just search.

products.name: LnkFlow
products.tagline: Agentic click tracking that shows what grows your business
products.summaryZh: 代理式点击追踪，清晰展示推动业务增长的关键因素。
products.descriptionZh: 看看哪些营销活动、渠道和合作能为你带来收益！采用可靠的服务器端点击追踪，统计广告拦截器隐藏的访问量。将任意URL转化为带有营销活动、渠道或创作者标签的简短品牌链接。默认过滤机器人，按实际点击驱动能力对创作者和平台进行排名。完全支持智能代理：你的AI助手可创建链接、添加标签，并用自然语言生成报告——无需操作后台。简洁链接输入，清晰答案输出。
products.description: See which campaigns, channels, and collabs make you money! With reliable, server-side click tracking that counts the visits, ad blockers hide. Turn any URL into a short, branded link tagged by campaign, channel, or creator. Rank creators and platforms by who actually drove clicks, with bots filtered out by default. And it's fully agentic-ready: your AI assistant can create links, tag them, and pull reports in plain language — no dashboard required. Clean links in, clear answers out.

products.name: Lunen.ai
products.tagline: Build AI agents your whole team can run, and control
products.summaryZh: 构建AI智能体，让整个团队都能运行并掌控。
products.descriptionZh: 你用过ChatGPT和Claude处理实际工作。它们只管完成任务，不记录操作痕迹，不审批风险步骤，也无法交给安全团队审查。用户体验很好，但治理为零。企业工具则走向另一个极端：完全可控，但界面没人想打开。Lunen 做到了自动化AI应有的样子——简洁的用户体验与完全的透明度兼得，而非二选一。现已开放早期访问。
products.description: You've used ChatGPT and Claude for real work. They just do the task. No record of what they touched, no approval on the risky step, nothing you could hand your security team. Great UX, zero governance. Enterprise tools flip it: total control, an interface nobody wants to open. Lunen is what automated AI should be, the clean UX and the full transparency, not one or the other. Now in early access.

products.name: CaptureKit
products.tagline: Keep your desktop clean by auto-organizing screenshots.
products.summaryZh: 自动整理截图，保持桌面整洁。
products.descriptionZh: CaptureKit 是一款原生 macOS 工具，可自动将每张截图保存至您指定的文件夹，避免桌面杂乱无章。保持工作区整洁，按项目整理截图，无需手动移动文件即可即时访问。适用于开发者、设计师、内容创作者以及任何每日频繁截图的用户。
products.description: CaptureKit is a native macOS utility that automatically saves every screenshot to the folder you choose instead of cluttering your desktop. Keep your workspace clean, organise screenshots by project, and access them instantly without manually moving files. Perfect for developers, designers, content creators, and anyone who takes screenshots every day.

products.name: Free AI Tools
products.tagline: Free browser tools for everyday tasks, no login
products.summaryZh: 日常任务免费浏览器工具，无需登录
products.descriptionZh: 使用免费在线浏览器工具调整图片大小、格式化JSON、计算数值、处理PDF、分析文本以及创建设计素材。无需注册账户。
products.description: Use free online browser tools to resize images, format JSON, calculate values, process PDFs, analyze text, and create design assets. No account required.

products.name: Deck
products.tagline: The most capable AI assistant with its own inbox
products.summaryZh: 自带收件箱的最强AI助手
products.descriptionZh: Deck 是一款常驻型 AI 助手，拥有专属的电子邮件收件箱。只需在邮件中抄送它，或直接分配任务，它便会接手处理。它会随着时间推移学习你的偏好与优先级，主动标记需要你关注的事项，并可按计划自动推送简报与状态更新。它专为处理模糊的多步骤任务而设计，让你能专注于日常事务。
products.description: Deck is an always-on AI assistant with its own email inbox. CC it on any thread or hand it a task, and it takes over. It learns your preferences and priorities over time, proactively flags what needs your attention, and can run on a schedule to deliver briefings and status updates automatically. It's built to take ambiguous, multi-step tasks head on, so you can move on with your day.

products.name: Rex
products.tagline: AI agents that run order-to-cash operations
products.summaryZh: 运行订单到现金流程的AI代理
products.descriptionZh: Rex为全球企业构建AI驱动的订单到现金工作流程，其智能代理覆盖每个账户，在资金滞留前解决异常问题。
products.description: Rex builds the AI order-to-cash workforce for global enterprises, with agents that cover every account and resolve exceptions before cash gets stuck.

products.name: NeuroVidz
products.tagline: See how a brain reacts to your clip
products.summaryZh: 看看你的片段在大脑中如何反应
products.descriptionZh: 上传一段视频或音频片段。大约一分钟后，NeuroVidz会绘制出大脑对其画面和声音的反应图谱——一个展示各组成部分的参与度评分、每秒情感时间线，以及带时间戳的下次编辑建议。多数工具只关注画面；NeuroVidz也会倾听，因此播客、音乐和语音驱动的片段能像听众感受那样获得评分。若无法生成可靠解读，它将退还积分。免费开始，无需信用卡——前50个账户获赠40积分。
products.description: Upload a video or audio clip. In about a minute, NeuroVidz maps how a brain would respond to its picture AND its sound — an engagement score that shows its components, a per-second emotion timeline, and timestamped suggestions for your next edit. Most tools focus on the frames alone; NeuroVidz listens too, so podcasts, music, and voice-driven clips score like a listener feels. If it can't produce a confident read, it refunds the credits. Start free, no card — founding 50 accounts get 40 credits.

products.name: Autoplot
products.tagline: Unify data analysis and plotting in one powerful workspace
products.summaryZh: 将数据分析与绘图统一于一个强大的工作区中。
products.descriptionZh: AutoPlot 是一款专为 Mac 原生打造的科学工作空间，用于绘图与探索性数据分析。可导入表格数据集、创建变量、构建 X&Y 图、直方图、热力图、相关性图、3D 图与图表，运行拟合，并组合图形进行矢量导出。基于 Metal 的 GPU 渲染确保 3D 场景与相关性网络在全数据集规模下保持交互——旋转、缩放与重新拟合无需等待重绘。原始数据值始终不会离开你的 Mac。
products.description: AutoPlot is a Mac native scientific workspace for plotting and exploratory data analysis. Import tabular datasets, create variables, build X&Y plots, histograms, heat maps, correlations, 3D plots, and charts, run fits, then compose figures with vector export. Metal-backed GPU rendering keeps 3D scenes and correlation networks interactive at full dataset size — rotate, zoom, and re-fit without waiting on a redraw. Raw data values never leave your Mac.

products.name: Backbeat Forge
products.tagline: Turn drum audio into a score you can actually edit
products.summaryZh: 将鼓点音频转化为可编辑的乐谱
products.descriptionZh: 放入完整混音或独立的鼓声轨。Backbeat Forge 会将演奏内容呈现在五线鼓谱上，你可以对照回放进行检查并手动修正。当谱面调整妥当后，可导出为可打印的 PDF 或通用 MIDI 文件。所有操作均在本地完成。
products.description: Drop in a full mix or an isolated drum stem. Backbeat Forge puts the performance on a five-line drum score you can check against playback and correct by hand. When the chart feels right, export it as a printable PDF or General MIDI file. It all runs locally.
